kinds.string: quoted text — a bare word errors
kinds.colour: a flat colour or --var, no gradient
kinds.marker: a marker glyph name (rides Markers, not the attr map)
kinds.track: a grid track — auto, a number, or repeat(...)
kinds.any: a positional or mixed form the property's own reader validates

shapes.one: one comma-group — a scalar or a space-separated tuple
shapes.pen: a draw: pen run — structured calls + :segment points

inherit.no: does not flow down the tree
inherit.text: the resolve text channel — nearest ancestor wins
inherit.scope-link: scene config a link takes from its scope; a dual-channel row (format) is also engine-read on its chart owners
inherit.engine: nearest-wins inside a layout engine, not resolve

ownerKinds.universal: every drawn node, in every layout
ownerKinds.root: the root's scene config (the stylesheet block)
ownerKinds.type: read on this primitive or template
ownerKinds.role: a layout role that is not one type

properties.name: letter-spacing
properties.example: |box| "S P A C E D" { letter-spacing: 3; }

properties.name: max-width
properties.example: |box| "a longer run of body copy that wraps" { max-width: 120; }

properties.name: pattern
mirror
properties.example: |sketch| { draw: move(-30, 0) up(8) right(30); mirror: x-axis; }

properties.name: revolve
break
rows
properties.example:
|box| { layout: grid; columns: repeat(2); rows: 40, auto; } [
  |box| "a"
  |box| "b"
  |box| "c"
  |box| "d"
]

properties.name: fn
axis
at
step
gridlines
place
activation
properties.example:
{ layout: sequence; activation: none; }

|box#a| "A"
|box#b| "B"
a -> b "msg"

properties.name: tol
datums
project
facing
of
